Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Claims RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 208 

PROFNL_SRVC_FEE_BILLED_AMT 

LABEL: Professional Service Fee Billed Amount 

DESCRIPTION: The charge to cover the clinical services, not otherwise covered under the professional dispensing fee. 

SHORT NAME: PROFNL_SRVC_FEE_BILLED_AMT 

LONG NAME: PROFNL_SRVC_FEE_BILLED_AMT 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims 

FILE(S): RX line 

VALUES: Dollar amount
